lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Can't you just leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: I don't trust that fish monger.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: Lighting fires in an enclosed space is probably not a good idea. Oh well.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: I guess it's not all bad down here. At least we have a pub.

lines.speaker: Man
lines.text: I'll leave this place one day. You'll see.
